parentAction.completionRule: A replayable generator, symbolic recurrence, finite Q partition, or concrete residual counterfamily is recorded with proof boundaries.

blockedObject.requiredStatement: Restore a source command/proof object that generates the SIX_PREFIX family menus and their ordering, or prove a symbolic recurrence/finite Q partition for every relevant future (n,Q) pair in the c = 32 + 50*m lane.
blockedObject.blockedReason: The local sync restores finite menus, singleton CRT packets, and chunked first-failure scan summaries, but no local source command or theorem object that emits the family menus or proves their all-future recurrence.

singletonCrtProvenance.interpretation: These packets prove row-level CRT witnesses for the known direct failures, but do not generate or order the family menu.

searchedFor: symbolic recurrence for knownFailures or squareModuli
positiveFindings: p848_anchor_search.py loads and scores the richest restored family menu.
p848_theorem_bridge.py builds theorem-facing bridge data from existing reports and live-frontier sync summaries.
The live-frontier sync contains six summary packets for chunked direct first-failure scans and six singleton CRT packets.
The README records the late square-modulus entries 17161 = 131^2 and 1849 = 43^2.
negativeFindings: The local code paths consume finite menu and chunk artifacts, but do not emit the SIX_PREFIX family menus.
No local source implementation for the packet methods anchor_chunked_frontier or anchor_singleton_crt was found outside frozen output artifacts.
No generator command, recurrence theorem, or finite Q-partition proof was found for the all-future mod-50 relevant-pair surface.
The restored sequence remains finite and unstable at late transitions, so it cannot be promoted to a recurrence by inspection.

reconstructionAttempt.observation: A row-level CRT check is possible from the tuple rows and square moduli, but a naive all-tuple enumeration over 23^6 square-modulus choices is too large to serve as a cheap generator proof.
reconstructionAttempt.requiredUpgrade: A bounded priority CRT enumerator must prove it reproduces each restored finite menu exactly, including ordering and no omitted smaller representatives, or the original generator must be restored.

deterministicBoundary.blockedInput: A replayable family-menu generator, bounded CRT priority enumerator with exact restored-menu reproduction proof, symbolic relevant-pair recurrence, finite Q partition, or concrete residual counterfamily.
acceptedSuccessors: Restore the original generator source/command that emits the SIX_PREFIX family menus from anchors, known failures, square moduli, threshold, limit, and distinctness parameters.
Implement a bounded CRT priority enumerator that reproduces the six restored menus exactly and proves no smaller representatives are omitted under each finite parameter set.
Prove a symbolic recurrence for new known failures and square moduli that makes the relevant-pair surface independent of finite snapshots.
Derive a finite Q partition from a theorem or generator proof, not from the TWENTY_FOUR menu alone.
Emit a concrete residual counterfamily with explicit n, Q, m-class denominator, and failed handoff.
deterministicBoundary.forbiddenShortcut: Do not treat frozen chunk summaries, singleton CRT packets, row-level CRT checks, or the 280-row menu as a restored generator, symbolic recurrence, finite Q partition, or all-N proof.

nextTheoremMove: Derive a bounded CRT priority menu enumerator that exactly reproduces the restored SIX_PREFIX_NINETEEN through TWENTY_FOUR menus, or restore the original generator; keep the symbolic all-future recurrence and finite Q partition open unless proved.
suggestedVerificationCommand: jq '{blockedObject, restoredFiniteSources, localSourceAudit, reconstructionAttempt, deterministicBoundary, recommendedNextAction, claims}' packs/number-theory/problems/848/SPLIT_ATOM_PACKETS/FRONTIER_BRIDGE/P848_MOD50_MENU_GENERATOR_RESTORATION_AUDIT_PACKET.json
proofBoundary: This packet proves that local finite chunk/CRT provenance is available but the mod-50 family-menu generator or symbolic relevant-pair recurrence is not restored locally. It does not prove a bounded menu enumerator, universal square-witness domain cover, finite Q partition, contrast-only recombination, p4217 complement coverage, or all-N.
